_meta.resume_note: Pinned to Pasadena City College's official 2025-2026 online catalog. The general Biology AS-T is fully extracted; the Biology program index lists no separate general Biology AS or AA.

degrees.degree_title_seen: Biology - Associate in Science Degree for Transfer
degrees.tmc_version_basis: The 2025-2026 catalog requires calculus and a two-course physics sequence, matching the prior Biology TMC rather than Biology 2.0.
degrees.catalog_status_seen: Listed as the sole general Biology award in PCC's official 2025-2026 Biology program index; no inactive or teach-out language is displayed.

sources.locator: 2025-2026 Academic Catalog, Associate in Science in Biology for Transfer Degree course table and degree total

courses.title_seen: The Diversity of Life on Earth: Structure, Function and Ecology
General Chemistry and Chemical Analysis I
General Chemistry and Chemical Analysis II

major_groups.label_seen: List A - complete one calculus course
List A - complete one physics sequence
major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete PHYS 002A and PHYS 002B, or complete PHYS 008A and PHYS 008B; courses may not be mixed across sequences.

courses.title_seen: General Physics I: Mechanics and Thermal Physics
General Physics II: Electromagnetism, Optics, and Modern Physics
Physics for Scientists and Engineers I: Mechanics
Physics for Scientists and Engineers II: Waves, Electricity & Magnetism

major_groups.choice_structure_seen: Complete Cal-GETC. Students with catalog rights to former patterns may instead complete CSU GE-Breadth or IGETC-CSU; eligible students may use the associated STEM variants.

major_groups.label_seen: Transferable electives as needed to reach 60 transferable units

degrees.notes: PCC prints a 30-34 required subtotal. The flat choose_units vocabulary cannot enforce paired physics sequences by itself. PCC's catalog-rights alternatives to Cal-GETC are preserved in choice_structure_seen.

notes: The official 2025-2026 Biology program index lists only the general Biology AS-T.
